Add forward_comp to build_frame_constraints() return list (after converse)
Run existing test suite to verify no regressions
Check for any significant test time increase

deviations.reason: build_forward_comp_constraint() was implemented alongside Phase 1 changes since build_frame_constraints() integration required it at the same time
